title: HR Admin Executive (Central | Contract role | URGENT!!) DT
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Support employee onboarding and offboarding.

  • Supports in employee benefits, leave records, and reimbursement claims administration.

  • Assist in the preparation and processing of Purchase Requests and Purchase Orders (POs).

  • Perform day-to-day administrative duties, including document control, filing, and data management.

  • Coordinate travel arrangements such as flight bookings, accommodation, and travel insurance.

  • Verify and process invoices and billings for payment submission.

  • Manage office supplies, staff welfare matters, and general office administration.

  • Coordinate routine office and showroom maintenance to ensure a well-maintained working environment.

  • Assist in organizing and executing company events and employee engagement activities, including team-building sessions, festive celebrations, staff outings, and annual events.

  • Provide administrative support to the HR team on ad-hoc projects and initiatives as required.

Requirements

  • Diploma in Human Resource Management, Business Administration, or a related discipline.

  • Minimum 2 years of relevant working experience.

  • Service-oriented with a proactive and positive attitude.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications.

  • Self-motivated, adaptable, and able to work effectively in a team environment.

    Attention to: Debbie Tan | 82115165

    By submitting any application or résumé to us, you will be deemed to have agreed and consented to us disclosing your personal information to prospective employers for their consideration.

    We regret to inform you that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. All applications will be treated with the strictest confidence.

    Elitez Pte Ltd | EA Licence: 16C8004| Hailey YANG | Registrations No: R1876431

ELITEZ PTE. LTD.


The Elitez Group was formed out of our collective expertise of enabling the growth of our clients via quality & timely Outsource Human Resource Services.

Our commitment towards People Excellence and Operational Excellence serve as the twin pillars supporting the vision of our clients. From outsource business processing to developing internal capabilities through training, we are Your HR Partner.
